name: Chocolate Cappucino Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Espresso, instant, dissolved in 1/4 cup hot water
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare chocolate crust: Combine 1 cup chocolate wafer crumbs, 1/4 cup softened butter, 2 tbsp sugar, and 1/4 tsp cinnamon. Mix well. Press mixture into a buttered springform pan.
2. Beat cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, mixing until well blended. Add eggs one at a time. Beat at low speed until very smooth.
3. Melt chocolate with cream over boiling water, stirring until smooth. Blend well with the cheese mixture. Add sour cream, salt, coffee liqueur, and vanilla; beat until smooth.
4. Turn into pan. Bake in the center of the oven at 350°F for 45 minutes or until sides are puffed. The center will be soft but will firm up when chilled. Turn off the oven; leave the door ajar. Allow cake to cool in the oven for 45 minutes. Cover and chill for 12 hours.
5. Whip cream: Flavor with sugar and liqueur. Garnish with mounds of whipped cream and chocolate leaves. Brush real leaves on one side with melted chocolate. Freeze until firm. Peel off leaves. Freeze until needed.
